classObjective: Calculate the mean, median, and mode of a data set.
workedExamples: 9-1, Example 1 — Find Mean, Median, and Mode
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: computing measures of center; identifying mode (including bimodal); percentile rank formula
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice calculating mean, median, and mode for various data sets
independentPractice: Practice problems calculating measures of center and percentile rank
assessment: Exit ticket: find the mean, median, and mode of a given data set and explain what each tells you
capReflection: When would the median be a better measure of center than the mean?
